archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Dark Mode

brand.name: Forge
brand.tone: Technical, authoritative, fast, precise. A no-nonsense developer tool. Bypasses the 'generic AI slop' aesthetic by anchoring itself in hardcore engineering visuals.

rules: The UI should be 95% monochrome. Color is strictly functional (success/error/primary CTA).

headings.styles: tracking-tight, leading-none. Use font-black for massive impact on landing pages.

mono.usage: Mandatory for pipeline logs, code snippets, file paths, and metric numbers.

marketing.hero: Asymmetric, overlapping elements, dark overlay (bg-black/40) if image is used.

dashboard.grid: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6.
dashboard.spacing: Dense (p-4, p-6). Every pixel must be utilized.
dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation + Topbar (Breadcrumbs & Actions) + Main Content Area.

surfaces.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px border. No drop shadows. Sharp or slightly rounded corners (max rounded-md).
surfaces.glass: Used strictly for floating navs or command palette: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10.
surfaces.borders: Grid Borders ('Technical Look'): Use border-collapse patterns to expose the skeleton of the UI.

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#262626] text-[#EDEDED] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-sm

pipeline_visualizer.style: DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph). Nodes are strict rectangles with 1px border. Edges are straight, orthogonal lines (no bezier curves).
pipeline_visualizer.states: Color-coded 1px left-border for status (Green for success, Red for fail, animated Gray dashed border for running).

terminal_viewer.style: Retro-Futurism 'Terminal' look. Deep black background (#000000). JetBrains Mono font. Text color: subtle gray for info, red for error, green for success.
terminal_viewer.features: Sticky header for stage name, auto-scroll to bottom.

navigation.sidebar: Slim, icon-heavy, expandable on hover. Uses Phosphor Icons.
navigation.command_palette: Central to navigation. Triggered by Cmd+K. Search repositories, deployments, settings.

forms.inputs: Shadcn-based but customized: bg-[#121212] border-[#262626] focus:border-[#E54D2E] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E54D2E]. No rounded corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm).

motion.hover_states: Slight translate-y (-translate-y-[1px]) for cards, border color shift to #E54D2E for interactive elements.
motion.loading: Use ASCII art loaders or monospaced 'compiling...' text instead of standard spinners where possible.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against dark backgrounds meets APCA minimums.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="deploy-button"`).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (2px solid #E54D2E) on all interactive elements when keyboard navigating.

icons.usage: Use 'duotone' or 'regular' weights. Keep them sharp and technical.

image_urls.description: Abstract futuristic cyber landscape with digital matrix.
Blue circuit patterned wall with dramatic lighting.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design 'Forge', a developer-first CI/CD SaaS. Do not make it look like a generic AI tool; it must look like a hardcore engineering platform.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use purple or teal. The UI should be predominantly black and dark gray, with Tomato Red (#E54D2E) used sparingly for high-impact actions.
Typography: Use Chivo for all headings (tight tracking), IBM Plex Sans for body text, and JetBrains Mono exclusively for data, logs, and pipeline nodes.
Implement the Pipeline Visualizer as an interactive DAG. Do not use generic lists. It should look like a technical schematic.
The Terminal Logs Viewer must be a prominent feature in the dashboard, utilizing pure black (#000000) and monospace fonts.

Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the marketing landing page layouts. Use Shadcn components for dashboard logic but heavily customize them to remove standard Vercel aesthetics (make borders sharper, remove shadows, use grid layouts).
Ensure the Command Palette (Cmd+K) is prominent in the UI design.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
